etymology.description: Depicts a chin -> original form of 頤(頤) (yí, "chin")
etymology.interpretation: The character 𦣞 is a pictogram representing a chin, illustrating its possible original use in depicting the physical feature. Later, it evolved into 頤(頤) (yí, "chin"), combining the original depiction with additional components to express the idea of a chin within the context of a head.
